Dotted Songti Square
====================

Source: https://github.com/wixette/dotted-chinese-fonts

Bundled file:
- DottedSongtiCircleRegular.otf
- DottedSongtiSquareRegular.otf

License:
- GPL-2.0, see LICENSE in this directory.

PiBoard uses the Circle face by default for CJK fallback glyph rasterization,
with Square kept as a local fallback. The built-in Latin/number LED bitmap font
remains the primary display font.
